testcase.name: test_create_returns_building_then_delete

failure.message: AssertionError: DELETE failed: no response assert (<Response [502]> is not None and 502 == 200) + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_cortex_iter19_campaigns.py:245: in test_create_returns_building_then_delete assert d is not None and d.status_code == 200, \ E AssertionError: DELETE failed: no response E assert (<Response [502]> is not None and 502 == 200) E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
